piece.line: Because you were on the brink of something beautiful, but you couldn’t quite reach it and you fell too far
piece.author: Bianca Phipps
piece.title: Almosts

piece.line: I was carved hallow by loving hands hold wars in the spaces between my ribs
piece.author: Bianca Phipps
piece.title: Born To Embody It

piece.line: You cannot break a mangled thing and you don’t know the last time your heart sounded like a heart
piece.author: Bianca Phipps
piece.title: The Heartbreaker piece

piece.line: When I sound like this I know my loved ones can find me
piece.author: Erin Schick
piece.title: Honest Speech

piece.line: When we are gone, what tangible life will be left for us?
piece.author: Ken Arkind
piece.title: David

piece.line: We all learned it from each other, the way each generation taught the next how to knit, weaving silence in between the threads
piece.author: Lily Myers
piece.title: shrinking Women

piece.line: We are human. We build bridges, we write books and hold grudges
piece.author: Meghann Plunkett
piece.title: Humans

piece.line: My heart would rattle and shake with all of the coins spilling back into it. I would stop digging around in my pockets for pieces of myself
piece.author: Melissa Lozada-Olivia
piece.title: If I Got Paid For All My Emotional Labor

piece.line: Ma mère n'a jamais eu des ailes
piece.author: Pages Matam
piece.title: Wings

piece.line: Know that your legs were made to run, your bones were made to heal
piece.author: Phil Kaye
piece.title: Beginning, Middle and End

piece.line: You make the same mistake over and over; you'll stop calling it a mistake
piece.author: Phil Kaye
piece.title: Repetition

piece.line: Strength from never being enough; healing from an open wound
piece.author: Samira Obeid
piece.title: Pigtails

piece.line: Because no matter how wide you stretch your fingers, your hands will always be too small to catch all the pain you want to heal.
piece.author: Sarah Kay
piece.title: If I Should Have A Daughter

piece.line: Instead, I said "it's okay."
piece.author: Sarah Kay
piece.title: Table Games

piece.line: I wouldn't be who I am, without the friends who let me fly and help me land
piece.author: Kodaline
piece.title: I Wouldn't Be

piece.line: I know you have felt much more love than you've shown
piece.author: Mumford and Sons
piece.title: Thistle and Weed

piece.line: And my head told my heart, "Let love grow". But my heart told my head, "This time no, this time no"
piece.author: Mumford and Sons
piece.title: Winter Winds

piece.line: And it might sound silly, but I still will try to be joyful, joyful, joyful and happy, sunny and bright
piece.author: X Ambassadors
piece.title: JOYFUL

piece.line: We could turn around, or we could give it up, but we'll take what comes
piece.author: Imagine Dragons
piece.title: Walking the Wire

piece.line: Stars are only visible in darkness
piece.author: Imagine Dragons
piece.title: Battle Cry

piece.line: I know you have felt much more love than you've shown
piece.author: Mumford and Sons
piece.title: Thistle and Weed

piece.line: You gotta give yourself a moment, let your body be
piece.author: Oh Wonder
piece.title: Lose It

piece.line: So give me hope in the darkness that I will see the light
piece.author: Mumford and Sons
piece.title: Ghosts That We Knew

piece.line: There’s a fire inside you, be the light that guides you
piece.author: X Ambassadors
piece.title: Torches

piece.line: I can’t fall back, I came too far. Hold myself up and love my scars
piece.author: Linkin Park
piece.title: Lost In The Echo

piece.line: When you’re happy like a fool, let it take you over
piece.author: OneRepublic
piece.title: Good Life

piece.line: A life with love is a life that’s been lived
piece.author: Ed Sheeran
piece.title: Supermarket Flowers

piece.line: There’s a light that you give me when I’m in shadow
piece.author: Coldplay
piece.title: Everglow

piece.line: We can still persevere, through the darkness and tears
piece.author: X Ambassadors
piece.title: Kerosene Dreams

piece.line: We can burn brighter than the sun
piece.author: fun.
piece.title: We Are Young

piece.line: You are my sunshine, my only sunshine
piece.author: Jimmie Davis
piece.title: You Are My Sunshine

piece.line: You are beautiful, in every single way
piece.author: Christina Aguilera
piece.title: Beautiful

piece.line: What are men to rocks and mountains?
piece.author: Emily Bronte
piece.title: Pride and Prejudice

piece.line: We are all fools in love
piece.author: Emily Bronte
piece.title: Pride and Prejudice
